design_voice: Odd, punishing, occasionally generous: lettres and counsel stack hidden costs (feint read, parry window, stamina) while sharpening damage or tempo. Hunger’s mechanical bite wobbles per run-state. Fae and Green Chapel lanes are world-hooks plus light combat skew — keep the player slightly wrong-footed but rewarded for leaning into the strangeness.

spawn_lanes.party_wille: Dreamer / Wille lane — strike, dodge, parry, feint-read deltas; counsel (Mede, hunger naming) layers meta pressure on top.
spawn_lanes.party_ally: Reserved for Piers / Conscience when allies exist; expect shared burdens and odd buffs.
spawn_lanes.fae_modifies: Fairy-transform ecology (Unity FaeAppearanceManager analogue) + combat: feint skew and dodge tax — pretty lies, costly footwork.
spawn_lanes.green_knight_ecology: Green Knight spawn weight + parry pressure — covenant language that makes the next exchange meaner.

medieval_texts.title: Hunger reflection
medieval_texts.player_facing_name: A lean rede from the feeld
medieval_texts.hidden_drawback: UI blurb stresses 'keen edge'; stamina tax on every strike is omitted until the player notices.

medieval_texts.title: Fair Field arrival
medieval_texts.hidden_drawback: Bonus damage; feint read skews one step (Mede-echo of the crowd).

medieval_texts.title: Green Chapel words
medieval_texts.hidden_drawback: Ward-warden taxes dodge stamina; GK trace slightly raises follow-up pressure (design hook).

medieval_texts.title: Fairy realm
medieval_texts.hidden_drawback: Player text: lighter step. World: higher fae transform chance; combat feint-read skews and dodge grows heavier — the fair folk tax attention.
